message:
refactor(pt-core): apply clippy lints across 38 source files

Comprehensive clippy-driven code quality improvements:
- Replace manual abs diff with u64::abs_diff()
- Use .first() instead of .get(0)
- Use is_none_or() instead of map_or(true, ...)
- Remove unnecessary explicit return statements
- Replace .clone() on Copy types with direct assignment
- Use sort_by_key with Reverse instead of manual sort_by comparisons
- Use idiomatic struct initialization with ..Default::default()
- Collapse nested if-else into combined conditions
- Replace if-is_some-unwrap patterns with if-let bindings
- Simplify boolean expressions and match arms

Net reduction of 38 lines while improving readability and
leveraging Rust standard library idioms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         low: low.max(0.0),
         high,
-        confidence: confidence.max(0.0).min(1.0),
+        confidence: confidence.clamp(0.0, 1.0),
         factors,
     }
 }
@@ -140,8 +140,7 @@ pub fn estimate_cpu_contribution(candidate: &ContributionCandidate) -> GoalContr
         low: low.max(0.0),
         high: high.min(1.0),
         confidence: (0.8 * (1.0 - candidate.respawn_probability * 0.5))
-            .max(0.0)
-            .min(1.0),
+            .clamp(0.0, 1.0),
         factors,
     }
 }
@@ -180,8 +179,7 @@ pub fn estimate_port_contribution(
         low: prob * 0.9,
         high: 1.0,
         confidence: (0.9 * (1.0 - candidate.respawn_probability * 0.5))
-            .max(0.0)
-            .min(1.0),
+            .clamp(0.0, 1.0),
         factors,
     }
 }

@@ -127,7 +127,7 @@ pub fn optimize_goal_plan(
             !c.is_protected
                 && c.confidence >= constraints.min_confidence
                 && c.expected_contribution > 0.0
-                && constraints.same_uid.map_or(true, |uid| c.uid == uid)
+                && constraints.same_uid.is_none_or(|uid| c.uid == uid)
         })
         .collect();
